best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-u-environment-007 title: join/view event module: u-environment source pages: 1 preconditions: event exists and user is logged in test data: event id test steps: 1. navigate to the "join/view event" activity from the u-environment 2. select the event to join or view 3. click on the "join" or "view" button expected result: user should be able to join or view the selected event
